title: Apps
description: An app that integrates with Zapier

image.description: Default image/icon to represent the app.

links.description:
A url that, when visited, will direct the user to authenticate with the app and allow Zapier access to the app, thus creating a new Authentication.

            If value is `null`, then no authentication is required to use the app. Client ID-authenticated requests will never have this object's fields populated.

action_types.description: A list of action types for this specific App

title.description: Human readable name of the app

images.description: The URL of images (of various sizes) for this specific App

hex_color.description: A branded color that can be used to represent the app.

categories.description: A list of categories to which this app belongs. Helpful in identifying apps by type and functionality.

description.description: Human readable description of the app.
